positive: Minimalist cosmic mountain range silhouette, viewed against a vibrant gradient sunset sky. The mountains are rendered in crisp black cut-out style, creating sharp contrasts with the warm, diffused colors of the background. The sky gradient transitions from deep indigo at the zenith, through magenta, to bright orange and soft yellow near the horizon. Include scattered, stylized constellation elements and flowing nebulae dust trails above the peaks. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Vector illustration style, clean lines, high contrast, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, low quality, noise, grainy
